title: elytraBugFix
description: Fixes sprint jumping with an elytra in a 2 block high tunnel.
body:
# Elytra Bugfix

Makes it so that you can spam the spacebar when walking in a 2 block high tunnel without the elytra activating

**Left: With Mod | Right: Without Mod**

![Demonstration video](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/lhppmvoe/images/86c8be19d63bbb7f4a50307bca67fd004576df3c.gif)
